text.en:
If your Army Faction is **ASTRA MILITARUM, OFFICER** with this ability can issue Orders. Each **OFFICER** datasheet will specify how many Orders it can issue in a battle round and which units are eligible to receive those Orders. Each time an **OFFICER** model issues an Order, select one of the Orders below, then select one eligible friendly unit within 6" of that **OFFICER** model to issue it to.

**OFFICER** models can issue Orders in your Command phase and at the end of a phase in which they disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** or were set up on the battlefield.

Until the start of your next Command phase, the unit you selected is affected by that Order. Unless otherwise stated, a unit can only be affected by one Order at a time (any Order subsequently issued to that unit replaces the current one). Orders cannot be issued to Battle-shocked units, and if a unit being affected by an Order becomes Battle-shocked, that Order ceases to affect that unit.

Only **ASTRA MILITARUM**  models gain the benefit of an Order issued to their unit.
MOVE! MOVE! MOVE!
Add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.
FIX BAYONETS!
Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.
TAKE AIM!
Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.
FIRST RANK, FIRE! SECOND RANK, FIRE!
Improve the Attacks characteristic of Rapid Fire weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.
TAKE COVER!
Improve the Save characteristic of models in this unit by 1 (this cannot improve a model’s Save to better than 3+).
DUTY AND HONOUR!
Improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in this unit by 1.

Friendly Drayden's Lance units can re-roll rolls to determine the:
  • A of a weapon.
  • D of an attack.
text.de:
Für befreundete Draydens-Lanze-Einheiten können Würfe wiederholt werden, um :
  • A einer Waffe zu bestimmen.
  • SW einer Attacke zu bestimmen.
text.es:
Las unidades Lanza de Drayden amigas pueden repetir las tiradas para determinar:
  • Los A de un arma.
  • El D de un ataque.
text.fr:
Les unités de la Lance de Drayden peuvent relancer les jets pour déterminer :
  • Les A d’une arme.
  • Les D d’une attaque.
text.it:
Le unità della Lancia di Drayden amiche possono ripetere i tiri per stabilire la caratteristica:
  • A di un’arma.
  • Da di un attacco.
text.ja:
味方ドライデン突撃騎兵隊・ユニットは、以下を決定する際のダイスをリロールしてもよい：
  • 武器の【数】。
  • 攻撃の【ダ】。
text.ko:
아군 드레이든의 창 유닛이 다음 사항을 정하는 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
  • 무기의 공격
  • 공격의 피해
text.zh:
己方德雷登的骑兵队单位可以进行以下重掷：
  • 武器的 A。
  • 一次攻击的 D。

text.en: Add **SQUADRON** to the list of units each **OFFICER** unit from your army can issue Orders to. Add the Order below to those listed in the Voice of Command ability.
On My Signal

This Order can only be issued to **ARMOURED SKIRMISHER** units (see Keywords). Each time an enemy unit ends a Normal or Advance move within 8" of this unit, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". Each unit can only move in this way once per turn.

**ASTRA MILITARUM WALKER** and **REGIMENT** models from your army have the Benefit of Cover. While such a model has the Benefit of Cover for any other reason, improve the Save characteristic of that model by 1 (to a maximum of 3+).

Each time a **SQUADRON** unit from your army Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it; until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit, and when making that Advance move, that unit can move within Engagement Range of enemy models but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of enemy models.

Each time an **ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC** or **ASTRA MILITARUM SQUADRON** unit from your army is selected to shoot, models in that unit can target enemy units within Engagement Range of that unit (including with Blast weapons), provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. When doing so, such models do not suffer the penalty to their Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units (excluding attacks made with Indirect Fire weapons).

Each time a model in a **REGIMENT** unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a visible unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**), that attack has the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

Each time a model in a **SQUADRON** unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a visible **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit, that attack has the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Abhuman und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung Abhuman gewählt werden.
text.es:

    • Dar 1 orden a unda unidad Pseudohumano amiga.

text.fr:

Ce détachement a l’étiquette Abhumain et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement Abhumain.
text.it:

    • Impartire l'Ordine Mirate!.
    • Impartire 1 Ordine a un'unità di Subumani amica.
Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Subumano e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Subumano.
text.ja:

    • 味方亜人・ユニット1個に最大1つまで命令を発令する。
このデタッチメントは亜人部隊タグを持ち、他の亜人部隊タグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko:
• 아군 불그린 분대/오그린 분대/래틀링 유닛에 아인종을 부여합니다.
  • 아군 커미사르 모델은 다음을 수행할 수 있습니다.
    • 적 조준! 명령 하달
    • 아군 아인종 유닛에 명령 1개 하달
이 디태치먼트에 아인종 태그가 부여되며 다른 아인종 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh:
• 己方 牛格林小队/欧格林小队/莱特林单位拥有亚人类关键词。
  • 己方政委模型能够：
    • 发布“瞄准！”命令。
    • 对一个己方亚人类单位发布一条命令。
本分遣队拥有亚人类标签，并且不能与另一个拥有亚人类标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

text.en:
Friendly Scout Sentinel/ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY SMOKE units have the following ability: Signal Flares: In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is designated:
  • While a unit is designated, that unit has +3" detection range.
    • This detachment has the RECON tag and cannot be taken with another RECON detachment.
text.de:
Befreundete Wächter-Spähläufer-/Astra-Militarum-Infanterie-Rauch-Einheiten haben die folgende Fähigkeit: Signalfackeln: In deiner Fernkampfphase kann diese Einheit eine für sie sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12" wählen. Jene feindliche Einheit ist geortet:
  • Solange eine Einheit geortet ist, hat sie +3" Entdeckungsreichweite.
    • Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Aufklärer und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung Aufklärer gewählt werden.
text.es:
Las unidades sentinels Exploradores/Infantería Humo Astra Militarum amigas tienen esta habilidad: Bengalas señalizadoras: En tu fase de disparo, esta unidad puede elegir 1 unidad enemiga visible y a 12" o menos de ella. Esa unidad enemiga está designada:
  • Mientras una unidad esté designada, tiene +3" al alcance de detección.
    • Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta RECONOCIMIENTO y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento RECONOCIMIENTO.
text.fr:
Les unités d'Infanterie de l'Astra Militarum avec le mot-clé Fumée / de Sentinel de Reconnaissance amies ont l’aptitude suivante :
  • Fusées Éclairantes : À votre phase de Tir, cette unité peut choisir une unité ennemie visible à 12" ou moins. L’unité ennemie est assignée :
    • Tant qu’une unité est assignée, elle a +3" en portée de détection.
      • Ce détachement a l'étiquette Reconnaissance et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement de Reconnaissance.
text.it:
Le unità di Sentinel Esploratori/Fanteria con Fumo dell’ASTRA MILITARUM hanno la seguente abilità: Bengala Segnalatori: nella tua fase di Tiro questa unità può scegliere un’unità nemica visibile entro 12". Quell’unità nemica è designata:
  • Fintanto che un’unità è designata, ha +3" alla distanza di individuazione.
    • Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Ricognizione e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Ricognizione.
text.ja:
味方スカウト・センチネル/帝国防衛軍・インファントリー・煙幕・ユニットは以下のアビリティを持つ： 発炎信号弾：自軍側射撃フェイズ中、このユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択できる。選択された敵ユニットは特定状態になる：
  • ユニットが特定状態である間、そのユニットの発見範囲は+3mvの修正を受ける。
    • このデタッチメントは偵察部隊タグを持ち、他の偵察部隊タグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko:
아군 정찰 센티널/아스트라 밀리타룸 보병 연막 유닛에 다음 능력을 부여합니다. 신호탄: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 이 유닛의 12" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어온 적 유닛을 하나 지정할 수 있습니다. 그 적 유닛은 지목됩니다.
  • 유닛이 지목된 동안에는, 그 유닛에 발각 범위 +3"를 적용합니다.
    • 이 디태치먼트에 정찰 태그가 부여되며 다른 정찰 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh:
己方侦察哨兵/星界军步兵烟幕单位拥有以下技能： 信号弹：在己方射击阶段中，该单位可以选择一个位于其 12" 内的可见敌方单位。那个敌方单位被指定：
  • 在一个单位被指定时，那个单位的侦测范围增加 3"。
    • 本分遣队拥有侦查标签，并且不能与另一个拥有侦查标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

text.en:
Add 1 to the number of Orders each **ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER** model from your army can issue, as stated on their datasheet.

While an **ASTRA MILITARUM** unit from your army is affected by an Order, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

name.fr: Nettoyage de la Zone de Feu

• If a friendly Militarum Tempestus Officer model is your Warlord, friendly Tempestus Scions units have:

• Wenn ein befreundetes Militarum-Tempestus-Offizier-Modell dein Kriegsherr ist, haben befreundete Tempestus-Gardisten-­Einheiten:
    • Linientruppen.
    • +1 MK.
  • Wenn eine befreundete Militarum-Tempestus-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird und jene Einheit in diesem Zug platziert wurde, haben die Fernkampfattacken jener Einheit +1 auf Trefferwürfe.
text.es:
• Si una miniatura Oficial Militarum Tempestus amiga es tu Señor de la guerra, las unidades Vástagos Tempestus amigas tienen:
    • Línea de batalla.
    • +1 a CO.
  • Cuando una unidad Militarum Tempestus amiga se elija para disparar, si esa unidad se desplegó en este turno, sus ataques a distancia tienen +1 a las tiradas para impactar.
  • Línea de batalla.
  • +1 a CO.
text.fr:
• Si une figurine d’Officier du Militarum Tempestus amie est votre Seigneur de Guerre, les unités de Pupilles du Tempestus amies ont :
    • Ligne.
    • +1 en CO.
  • Quand une unité du Militarum Tempestus amie est choisie pour tirer, si elle a été placée à ce tour, ses attaques de tir ont +1 aux jets de touche.
text.it:
• Se un modello di Ufficiale del Militarum Tempestus amico è il tuo Generale, le unità di Figli Tempestus amiche hanno:
    • Linea di Battaglia.
    • +1 CO.
  • Quando un'unità del Militarum Tempestus amica viene scelta per tirare, se quell'unità è stata schierata in questo turno i suoi attacchi da tiro hanno +1 ai tiri per colpire.
text.ja:
• 味方ミリタルム・テンペストゥス・将校・兵が自軍のウォーロードである場合、味方テンペストゥス・サイオン・ユニットは：
    • バトルラインを持つ。
    • 【確】に+1の修正を受ける。
  • 味方ミリタルム・テンペストゥス・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時、そのユニットがこのターン中に配置されたばかりである場合、そのユニットの射撃攻撃はヒットロールに+1の修正を受ける。
text.ko:
• 플레이어의 총사령관이 아군 밀리타룸 템페스투스 장교 모델이라면, 아군 템페스투스 사이온 유닛에 다음을 적용합니다.
    • 전열 부여
    • 장악 +1
  • 아군 밀리타룸 템페스투스 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때, 이번 턴에 그 유닛을 전장에 놓았다면, 그 유닛의 원거리 공격에 명중 굴림 +1을 적용합니다.
text.zh:
• 如果一个己方暴风军军官模型是己方统帅，那么己方风暴忠嗣军单位拥有：
    • 战线关键词。
    • +1 OC。
  • 在一个己方暴风军单位被选择进行射击时，如果那个单位在本回合中被部署，那么那个单位远程攻击的命中掷骰 +1。

text.en: Each time an **ASTRA MILITARUM** model from your army makes a ranged attack in a turn in which it disembarked from a **TRANSPORT,** add 1 to the Wound roll.

At the start of the battle round, select one of the following types of artillery support.

■ **Creeping Barrage:** Roll one D6 for each enemy unit that is more than 12" from every model from your army that is on the battlefield: On a 5+, until the end of the battle round, that unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2” from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it. The maximum number of units that can be shaken by this rule in each battle round depends on the battle size, as shown below.

■ **Incendiary Bombardment:** Select a number of enemy units more than 12" from every model from your army that is on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle round, those enemy units are scattered. While a unit is scattered, it cannot have the Benefit of Cover. The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size, as shown below.

■ **Smoke Shells:** Select a number of units from your army. Until the end of the battle round, those units have the Stealth ability. The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size, as shown below.

name.ja: ドライデン突撃騎兵隊

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER** unit from your army.

effect.en: Select one or more friendly **ASTRA MILITARUM** units within 6" of your unit; until the end of the phase, you can re‑roll Advance rolls made for those units.

fluff.en: At a barked order, armour and infantry surge forward as one, utilising speed and aggression to close with objectives and the enemy.

target.en: One **ARMOURED SKIRMISHER** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a visible **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

fluff.en: This vehicle’s heavy weapons support lightly equipped infantry, suppressing enemy armour and bringing down lumbering monsters.

target.en: That **ARMOURED SKIRMISHER** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase, just after an **ARMOURED SKIRMISHER** unit from your army has shot.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover, and each time an **ARMOURED SKIRMISHER** unit from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 2.

fluff.en: Hammering the enemy, this transport’s crew share targeting solutions with nearby allies, allowing for concentrated combined fire to obliterate the foe’s infantry and even erode armour plating.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM** unit from your army that disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Emerging from their armoured transports, heavily armed soldiers open fire before enemies can dive for cover or angle their stoutest armour towards the fusillade.

target.en: One **PLATOON** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[PRECISION]** ability.

fluff.en: Reconnaissance units are often comprised of experienced survivalists and hunters, many of whom are expert marksmen.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM MOUNTED** or **ASTRA MILITARUM WALKER** unit from your army that is wholly within 10" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: Sentinels and cavalry units use their speed and mobility to outflank the foe, ready to strike at the most opportune moment.

target.en: That **SQUADRON** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **SQUADRON** unit from your army Advances.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced.

fluff.en: By petitioning the machine spirits of their vehicles, tank crews push their armoured steeds beyond conventional limits.

target.en: One **SQUADRON** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within 12", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: At close range, armoured vehicles open up with their full complement of weapons, dispensing the Emperor’s righteous wrath.

target.en: One **REGIMENT** unit from your army and one **SQUADRON** unit from your army within 6" of and visible to that **REGIMENT** unit.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, Orders affecting one of your units affect the other, and vice versa.

fluff.en: The potency of armour and infantry is greatly enhanced when both work in close concert.

target.en: One **REGIMENT** unit and one **SQUADRON** unit from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the phase, each time your selected **REGIMENT** and **SQUADRON** units make an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: Armour and infantry work in concert, forming overlapping fields of fire against which neither cover nor heavy armour can protect.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE** unit from your army.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is allocated to an **INFANTRY** model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of your **VEHICLE,** that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

fluff.en: The indefatigable tanks of the Astra Militarum serve as mobile cover for the troops marching in their shadow

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

fluff.en: Marksmanship is a skill that only increases with experience.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM** unit from your army affected by an Order that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

effect.en: If your unit is within range of an objective marker, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

fluff.en: Clear the area and defend your objectives. Take no prisoners.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY** unit from your army affected by the First Rank, Fire! Second Rank, Fire! Order.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: Named for the soldiers of Mordian, this rapid-fire drill requires exceptional accuracy and coordination, but renders even the humble lasgun highly lethal.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: Veteran soldiers know the value of additional protection, whether welded to vehicles or worn under flak armour.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM** unit from your army that disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Mechanised charges rely upon shock, awe and speed to secure ground. Any enemies that block the path must be obliterated swiftly.

target.en: One **TRANSPORT** unit from your army (excluding **AIRCRAFT** and **TITANIC** units) that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and is within 8" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.

when.en: Your opponent’s movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your **TRANSPORT** can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: Fast-moving armoured transports allow a commander to react quickly to enemy movements and intercept outflanking opponents.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY** unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.

when.en: Your opponent’s Charge phase, after an enemy unit has selected targets for its charge but before it makes a Charge move.

effect.en: Provided your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and every model in your unit is within 3" of an **ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT** from your army, it can embark within that **TRANSPORT.**

fluff.en: Should the tide turn against them, mechanised forces swiftly re-embark their transports in order to reposition.

target.en: One **PLATOON** unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered to be within Engagement Range of your unit for the purposes of selecting targets of ranged weapons. Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model loses a wound, while that model’s unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 4+, one model from your unit is destroyed after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.

fluff.en: All victory requires sacrifice. The destruction of the enemy must always take priority over the preservation of lives.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if it is a **REGIMENT** model. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: Inured to the savage horrors of trench warfare, these warriors will fight until their last breath.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Only the most disciplined soldiers and vehicle crews can maintain accuracy in the deafening confusion of an armoured clash.

target.en: One **SQUADRON** unit from your army that is Below Half-strength (excluding **OFFICER** units).

effect.en: Until the end of the battle round, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit (excluding **[ONE SHOT]** weapons) have the **[HAZARDOUS]** ability, and each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic and to the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Even with flames licking through the interior of their vehicle, this crew refuse to abandon their positions, regardless of the risk to their lives.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit. Until the end of the phase, add 6 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 2, and each time a model in your unit fights, it can only target that enemy unit.

fluff.en: An unstoppable engine of destruction, this super‑heavy tank thunders forward, crushing enemies to bloody pulp beneath its steel treads.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER** unit from your army.

effect.en: Your **OFFICER** can issue one Order as if it were your Command phase.

fluff.en: The greatest officers make their voices heard at the critical moment, their orders swift and decisive.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER** unit from your army.

effect.en: Your unit’s **OFFICER** model can issue 1 Order as if it were your Command phase.

fluff.en: Reading the flow of battle and reacting in accordance, this officer expects their barked orders to be followed post-haste.

target.en: That **ARMOURED SKIRMISHER** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after an **ARMOURED SKIRMISHER** unit from your army Advances or Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

fluff.en: Armoured fighting vehicles and transports keep pace with the infantry, supporting the advance as mobile gun platforms.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM** unit from your army that did not Remain Stationary or arrive from Reserves this phase.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

fluff.en: Pushing bodies or engines to the limit, these warriors continue their swift advance.

target.en: One **PLATOON** unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit, and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: Light infantry utilise harassing fire to draw their enemies into position for an ambush.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY** or **ASTRA MILITARUM MOUNTED** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of your opponent’s Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability, and each time an enemy model makes an attack, if your unit is the closest eligible target, subtract 1 from the hit roll.

fluff.en: These soldiers scream blood-curdling battle cries as they rush forwards, emboldening their squad mates and causing the enemy to waver.

target.en: That **SQUADRON** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **SQUADRON** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: Even in retreat, the armoured fist of the Astra Militarum keep their cannons firing.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE** unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features as if they were not there.

fluff.en: Ruins, barricades, bunkers; few such structures can impede the grinding advance of an Astra Militarum armoured corps.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC** unit from your army that is in Reserves.

when.en: Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, from the second battle round onwards.

effect.en: Set up your unit on the battlefield, wholly within 8" of the battlefield edge and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

fluff.en: The arrival of a super‑heavy tank on the battlefield can swiftly turn the tide of the fight.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE** unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

fluff.en: Barricades, trenches, bunkers and ruins: these obstacles are ground to dust by the obdurate advance of Astra Militarum armour.

target.en: That **ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase, just after an **ASTRA MILITARUM TITANIC** unit from your army has shot.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

fluff.en: Turrets and sponsons unleash a tempest of fury, toppling fortifications and leaving stunned and wounded enemies exposed to incoming fire.

target.en: That **ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase, just after an **ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE** unit from your army has shot.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

fluff.en: Subjected to a thunderous volley of explosive shells and bullets, enemies begin to waver.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM** unit from your army affected by the Duty and Honour! Order.

effect.en: If your unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of a phase.

fluff.en: Battle-hardened and zealous, the company’s grizzled elites will gladly give their lives to honour the Emperor.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY** unit from your army that disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** this phase.

effect.en: Your **INFANTRY** unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

fluff.en: Troops trained in mechanised combat disembark swiftly from their transport’s hatches, avoiding incoming fire and advancing on their objectives.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM** unit from your army.

effect.en: Provided your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and every model in your unit is within 3" of an **ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT** from your army, it can embark within that **TRANSPORT.**

fluff.en: High command’s priorities have shifted. Swift embarkation and redeployment is required.

target.en: One **PLATOON** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit while targeting an enemy unit within half range.

fluff.en: Whilst accuracy has its benefits, sheer weight of fire is no less effective at bringing down the foe.

target.en: One **INFANTRY** **REGIMENT** unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

effect.en: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength and with all of its wounds remaining.

restrictions.en: This Stratagem cannot be used to return destroyed **CHARACTER** units to Attached units. You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

fluff.en: So numerous are the infantry of the Astra Militarum that fresh reserves can be called up at a moment’s notice.

target.en: Any number of **ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER** units from your army.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your **OFFICERS** can issue Orders to **REGIMENT** units and **SQUADRON** units.

fluff.en: Some Astra Militarum officers have served with infantry and armour, and are equally adept at commanding either.

target.en: One **INFANTRY OFFICER** model from your army.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, when your model issues the Move! Move! Move! Order, it can issue that Order to any number of eligible friendly **INFANTRY REGIMENT** units, regardless of range to your model.

fluff.en: The whistle blows to signal the attack. Waves of infantry emerge from cover to advance upon the foe.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of your opponent’s Reinforcements step.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of your unit.

fluff.en: This unit is equipped with a scramble field generator, a device capable of disrupting teleportation beacons and other homing technology.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM GRENADES** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.

effect.en: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. When that enemy unit declares a charge, that enemy unit has -1 to charge rolls.

fluff.en: Employed by skirmishers and recon troops, tanglefoot grenades ensnare advancing infantry, slowing their advance.

target.en: One **INFANTRY OFFICER** unit from your army embarked within a **TRANSPORT.** You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it is embarked within a **TRANSPORT.**

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit can issue Orders even though it is not on the battlefield, and it can issue Orders to **ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT** units from your army (excluding **TITANIC** units) regardless of the distance to and from your unit’s **TRANSPORT.**

fluff.en: This armoured transport has been modified to house a tactical command suite and vox-relay, enabling embarked officers to give orders from relative safety.

target.en: One **PLATOON** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit ends a Charge move within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6 for each model in that enemy unit: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

fluff.en: Sappers have laid down a network of mines across the battlefield. Should the enemy attempt an ill-advised assault, they will surely suffer for it.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM CHARACTER** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes an attack that targets a visible enemy unit within 12", you can re-roll the Hit roll.

fluff.en: As the infantry assault proceeds, flares are fired into the skies, illuminating opponents below.

target.en: One **ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack

fluff.en: Crews routinely reinforce their vehicle’s armour, adding ablative plating, track links, sandbags and other means to protect the hull.

target.en: One friendly <k>Drayden's Lance Officer</k> unit.
target.es: Una unidad <k>Oficial Lanza de Drayden</k> amiga.
target.fr: Une unité d’<k>Officier</k> de <k>Lance de Drayden</k> amie.
target.it: Un’unità di <k>Ufficiale della Lancia di Drayden</k> amica.
target.ja: 味方<k>ドライデン突撃騎兵隊・将校</k>・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>德雷登的骑兵队军官</k>单位。

effect.en:
Select one enemy unit. Friendly Drayden's Lance units' attacks that target that enemy unit have the following until the start of your next turn:
  • [Lethal Hits].
  • [Ignores Cover], if they are ranged attacks
effect.de:
Wähle eine feindliche Einheit. Attacken befreundeter Draydens-Lanze-Einheiten gegen jene feindliche Einheit haben bis zu Beginn deines nächsten Zugs:
  • [Tödliche Treffer].
  • [Deckung ignorieren], wenn es sich um Fernkampfattacken handelt.
effect.es:
Elige 1 unidad enemiga. Hasta el inicio de tu siguiente turno, los ataques de las unidades Lanza de Drayden amigas que tomen como blanco esa unidad enemiga tienen:
  • [Impactos letales].
  • [Ignora cobertura], si son ataques a distancia
effect.fr:
Choisissez une unité ennemie. Les attaques des unités de Lance de Drayden amies qui ciblent l’unité ennemie choisie ont ce qui suit jusqu’au début de votre prochain tour :
  • [Touches Fatales].
  • [Ignore le Couvert], si ce sont des attaques de tir
effect.it:
Scegli un’unità nemica. Gli attacchi delle unità della Lancia di Drayden amiche che hanno come bersaglio quell’unità nemica hanno le seguenti abilità fino all’inizio del tuo prossimo turno:
  • [Colpi Letali].
  • [Ignora la Copertura] se sono attacchi da tiro
.
effect.ja:
敵ユニットを1個選択せよ。次の自軍ターン開始時まで、選択された敵ユニットを対象とする味方ドライデン突撃騎兵隊・ユニットの攻撃は次の効果を得る：
  • ［会心ヒット］。
  • 射撃攻撃の場合、[遮蔽無効]。
effect.ko:
적 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 플레이어의 다음 턴이 시작될 때까지 그 유닛을 대상으로 지정한 아군 드레이든의 창 유닛의 공격에 다음을 부여합니다.
  • [살상타].
  • 그 공격이 원거리 공격이라면 [엄폐 무시]
effect.zh:
选择一个敌方单位。直到下一个己方回合开始前，己方德雷登的骑兵队单位针对那个敌方单位的攻击拥有：
  • [致命一击]。
  • 如果攻击是远程攻击，那么还拥有[无视掩体]。

fluff.en: Identifying a priority threat, Major Drayden directs his warriors to saturate the target’s position with scouring fire.
fluff.de: Oberst Drayden macht ein Prioritätsziel aus und befiehlt seinen Kriegern, die entsprechende Feindposition mit vernichtendem Feuer einzudecken.
fluff.es: Al identificar una amenaza prioritaria, el Mayor Drayden ordena a sus guerreros que saturen su posición con fuego abrasador.
fluff.fr: Le Major Drayden identifie une menace prioritaire et ordonne à ses guerriers d’en saturer la position sous leur feu.
fluff.it: Avvistato un bersaglio prioritario, il Maggiore Drayden ordina ai sottoposti di tempestare di raffiche micidiali la posizione.
fluff.ja: 優先すべき脅威を見定めたドライデン少佐は、標的の位置に対して火力を集中させるべく、自らの兵に射撃を指示する。
fluff.ko: 우선적 위협 요소를 식별한 드레이든은 휘하 장병에 명령하여 목표물의 위치로 포화 사격을 가한다.
fluff.zh: 在识别了首要威胁后，德雷登少校会指引手下的战士们对目标进行集火。

target.en: One friendly <k>Drayden's Lance</k> unit.
target.fr: Une unité de <k>Lance de Drayden</k> amie.
target.ja: 味方<k>ドライデン突撃騎兵隊</k>・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>德雷登的骑兵队</k>单位。

when.es: Al final de tu fase de movimiento.
when.fr: À la fin de votre phase de Mouvement.
when.it: Alla fine della tua fase di Movimento.
when.ja: 自軍移動フェイズ終了時。
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段结束时。

effect.en: Select one objective your unit is controlling. That objective is secured.
effect.de: Wähle ein von deiner Einheit kontrolliertes Missionsziel. Jenes Missionsziel ist gesichert.
effect.es: Elige 1 objetivo que tu unidad controle. Ese objetivo está asegurado.
effect.fr: Choisissez un objectif que votre unité contrôle. Cet objectif est sécurisé.
effect.it: Scegli un obiettivo controllato dalla tua unità. Quell’obiettivo è messo in sicurezza.
effect.ja: 自軍ユニットが確保している作戦目標1個を選択する。その作戦目標は安定化する。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 장악한 목표물을 하나 지정합니다. 그 목표물은 확보 상태가 됩니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个该己方单位控制的目标。那个目标被占领。

fluff.en: Operating as the vanguard of larger Astra Militarum forces, Drayden’s Lance secures footholds in enemy territory.
fluff.de: Draydens Lanze agiert als Speerspitze für größere Astra-Militarum-Verbände und sichert Brückenköpfe in feindlichem Territorium.
fluff.es: Operando como la vanguardia de las fuerzas más numerosas del Astra Militarum, la Lanza de Drayden asegura puntos de apoyo en territorio enemigo.
fluff.fr: À l’avant-garde du gros des forces de l’Astra Militarum, la Lance de Drayden ménage des têtes de pont en territoire ennemi.
fluff.it: Fungendo da avanguardia dei contingenti dell’Astra Militarum, la Lancia di Drayden stabilisce delle teste di ponte in territorio ostile.
fluff.ja: より大規模な帝国防衛軍の前衛として行動するドライデン突撃騎兵隊は、敵地に橋頭保を確保する。
fluff.ko: 대규모 아스트라 밀리타룸 군세의 전위대로 활동하는 드레이든의 창은 적 영역 내에서 교두보를 마련한다.
fluff.zh: 身为星界军主力部队的先锋，德雷登的骑兵队需要在敌方领地中占据一处领地。

target.en: That <k>Drayden's Lance</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ドライデン突撃騎兵隊</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>德雷登的骑兵队</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged Drayden's Lance unit.
when.de: Bewegungsphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine Bewegung innerhalb von 8" um eine nicht im Nahkampf befindliche befreundete Draydens-Lanze-Einheit beendet
when.es: En la fase de movimiento del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga termine un movimiento a 8" o menos de una unidad Lanza de Drayden amiga no trabada.
when.fr: À la phase de Mouvement adverse, quand une unité ennemie finit un mouvement à 8" ou moins d’une unité de Lance de Drayden amie non engagée.
when.it: Nella fase di Movimento dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica termina un movimento entro 8" da un’unità della Lancia di Drayden amica non ingaggiata.
when.ja: 敵軍移動フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方の非接敵状態であるドライデン突撃騎兵隊・ユニットの8mv以内に一部でも入っている位置で移動を終了した時。
when.ko: 상대의 이동 페이즈, 적 유닛이 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 드레이든의 창 유닛의 8" 내에서 이동을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的移动阶段中，当一个敌方单位在一个不处于交战状态的己方德雷登的骑兵队单位的 8" 内结束一次移动时。

effect.en: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+1".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine normale Bewegung von bis zu W3+1" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 1D3+1".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement normal de D3+1" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo D3+1".
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは、最大D3+1mvまでの通常移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 최대 D3+1"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 该己方单位可以进行一次最多 D3+1" 的常规移动。

fluff.en: A lightly-armed force of skirmishers, Drayden’s Lance are careful not to get bogged down in battles they cannot win.
fluff.de: Draydens Lanze besteht aus leicht gepanzerten Plänklern und achtet darauf, sich nicht in Kämpfe verwickeln zu lassen, die nicht zu gewinnen sind.
fluff.es: La Lanza de Drayden es una fuerza de hostigadores con armas ligeras que sabe evitar las batallas que no puede ganar.
fluff.fr: La Lance de Drayden est une force légère de tirailleurs soucieux de ne pas se laisser entraîner dans des batailles qu’ils ne peuvent gagner.
fluff.it: La Lancia di Drayden, un gruppo di schermagliatori con armi leggere, cerca di non farsi bloccare in scontri insormontabili.
fluff.ja: 軽装の散兵より成るドライデン突撃騎兵隊は、勝機のない戦いに拘泥せぬよう慎重に行動する。
fluff.ko: 경무장 척후부대인 '드레이든의 창'은 이길 수 없는 전투에 휘말리지 않기 위해 신중을 기한다.
fluff.zh: 身为装备轻便的前卫部队，德雷登的骑兵队会小心选择交战，以防被卷入无法获胜的战斗当中。

target.en: That <k>Bullgryn Squad/Ogryn Squad</k> unit.
target.es: Esa unidad <k>Escuadra de Torogretes/Escuadra de Ogretes</k>.
target.fr: Cette unité d’<k>Escouade de Taurogryns/Escouade d’Ogryns</k>.
target.ja: その<k>ブルグリン・スカッド/オグリン</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>牛格林小队/欧格林小队</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Bullgryn Squad/Ogryn Squad unit that is within range of an objective.
when.de: In der Fernkampfphase deines Gegners oder in der Nahkampfphase, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete Bullgryntrupp-/Ogryntrupp-Einheit in Reichweite eines Missionsziels als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad enemiga tome como blanco una unidad Escuadra de Torogretes/Escuadra de Ogretes amiga que esté dentro del alcance de algún objetivo.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité d’Escouade de Taurogryns/Escouade d’Ogryns amie qui est à portée d’un objectif.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell'avversario o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un'unità nemica sceglie come bersaglio un'unità di Squadra Bullgryn/Squadra Ogryn amica che si trova entro la gittata di un obiettivo.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、敵ユニットが、作戦目標の確保範囲内にいる味方ブルグリン・スカッド/オグリン・スカッド・ユニットを攻撃対象に選択した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 적 유닛이 목표물 범위 내에 있는 아군 불그린 분대/오그린 분대 유닛을 대상으로 지정했을 때.
when.zh: 对手的射击阶段或在近战阶段中，当一个敌方单位将一个位于目标范围内的己方牛格林小队/欧格林小队单位选为目标时。

effect.en: Attacks that target your unit have -1 AP until that enemy unit has attacked.
effect.de: Attacken gegen deine Einheit haben -1 DS, bis jene feindliche Einheit attackiert hat.
effect.es: Los ataques que tomen como blanco tu unidad tienen -1 FP hasta que esa unidad enemiga haya atacado.
effect.fr: Les attaques qui ciblent votre unité ont -1 en PA jusqu'à ce que cette unité ennemie ait attaqué.
effect.it: Gli attacchi che hanno come bersaglio la tua unità hanno -1 VP finché quell'unità nemica non ha attaccato.
effect.ja: その敵ユニットの攻撃が終わるまでの間、その自軍ユニットを対象とする攻撃は【貫】に-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 그 적 유닛이 공격 수행을 종료할 때까지 이 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 공격에 관통 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 在那个敌方单位完成攻击前，针对您的单位进行的攻击拥有 -1AP。

fluff.en: With an order to hold the line, Ogryn auxilia will devotedly – and stubbornly – endure the most extreme firepower to see their duty done.
fluff.de: Wenn ihnen befohlen wird, die Linie zu halten, werden Ogryn-Hilfstruppen entschlossen und starrsinnig, im Namen der Pflichterfüllung auch die heftigste Feuerkraft über sich ergehen lassen.
fluff.es: Con la orden de mantener la línea, los Ogretes soportarán con devoción y tenacidad la potencia de fuego más extrema con tal de cumplir con su deber.
fluff.fr: Une fois l’ordre donné de tenir la ligne, les auxiliaires ogryns résisteront jusqu’au bout au feu le plus nourri avec dévouement et obstination.
fluff.it: Ricevuto l'ordine di mantenere la posizione, gli Ogryn ausiliari sopportano strenuamente le raffiche più devastanti pur di obbedire.
fluff.ja: 戦列を保持せよとの命令を受ければ、オグリン補助兵は献身的かつ頑固に、いかなる猛烈な火力にも耐え抜き、その任務を全うする。
fluff.ko: 전선을 유지하라는 명령을 받은 오그린 지원부대는 헌신적으로 그 임무를 수행하기 위해 극심한 화력조차도 고집스레 버텨낸다.
fluff.zh: 在受命坚守战线后，欧格林辅助军的士兵们会极其忠诚且顽强地完成自己的任务，抵御极端的攻击。

target.en: That <k>Bullgryn Squad/Ogryn Squad</k> unit.
target.es: Esa unidad <k>Escuadra de Torogretes/Escuadra de Ogretes</k>.
target.fr: Cette unité d’<k>Escouade de Taurogryns/Escouade d’Ogryns</k>.
target.ja: その<k>ブルグリン・スカッド/オグリン</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个 <k>牛格林小队/欧格林小队</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit that targeted a friendly unengaged BULLGRYN SQUAD/OGRYN SQUAD unit has shot.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, nachdem eine feindliche Einheit auf eine befreundete Bullgryntrupp-/Ogryntrupp-Einheit geschossen hat, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga que tomase como blanco una unidad Escuadra de Ogretes/Escuadra de Torogretes amiga no trabada haya disparado.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie qui a ciblé une unité d’Escouade de Taurogryns/Escouade d’Ogryns amie non engagée a tiré.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell'avversario, quando un'unità nemica ha tirato, se quell'unità ha scelto come bersaglio un'unità Squadra Bullgryn/Squadra Ogryn amica non ingaggiata.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが、非接敵状態の味方ブルグリン・スカッド/オグリン・スカッド・ユニットを対象に射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 불그린 분대/오그린 분대 유닛을 대상으로 지정한 적 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 对手的射击阶段中，在一个敌方单位针对一个不处于交战状态的己方牛格林小队/欧格林小队单位进行了射击后。

effect.en: Your unit can make a surge move of up to D6".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine Ansturmbewegung von bis zu W6" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento súbito de hasta 1D6".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement d’élan de D6” maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento d'impeto di massimo D6".
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、最大D6mvまでの進撃移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 최대 D6"의 쇄도 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D6" 的迸发移动。

fluff.en: An enemy who manages to pierce the Ogryns’ dense forms often succeeds only in attracting their attention and becoming the objects of a sudden and trampling rush.
fluff.de: Ein Feind, dem es gelingt, die stumpfsinnigen Gestalten der Ogryns zu verletzen, zieht damit oft nur ihre Aufmerksamkeit auf sich und wird Ziel eines plötzlichen Ansturms schwerer Stiefel.
fluff.es: Un enemigo que logra golpear las densas formas de los Ogretes a menudo solo logra atraer su atención y convertirse en blanco de una repentina y aplastante embestida.
fluff.fr: L’ennemi qui parvient à percer le corps dense des Ogryns ne réussit bien souvent qu’à attirer leur attention et devenir l’objet d’une ruée soudaine et écrasante.
fluff.it: Un nemico che riesce a trapassare l'imponente corpo degli Ogryn attira la loro attenzione e spesso diventa il bersaglio di un'improvvisa carica.
fluff.ja: オグリンの分厚い体躯を貫いた敵であっても、それは往々にしてかれらの注意を引くだけだ。次の瞬間には、猛烈な蹂躙の突撃を受けることとなる。
fluff.ko: 오그린의 탄탄한 신체에 뚫고 상처를 낸 적이 실질적으로 이뤄낼 것은 주의가 끌려 갑작스럽게 달려든 오그린의 발 밑에 밟히는 것 뿐이다.
fluff.zh: 那些设法刺穿欧格林那厚实身躯的敌人，往往只会成功地招致他们的注意，进而沦为他们那突如其来、践踏一切的猛冲攻势的目标。

target.en: That <k>Ratlings</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ラットリング</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>Ratlings</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, nachdem eine befreundete <k>Rattling</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad <k>Rátidos</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de <k>Ratlings</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un'unità di <k>Ratling</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>ラットリング</k>・ユニットが射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>래틀링</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，在一个己方<k>莱特林</k>单位完成射击后。

effect.en: Those ranged attacks do not prevent your unit from being hidden.
effect.de: Jene Fernkampfattacken verhindern nicht, dass deine Einheit versteckt ist.
effect.es: Esos ataques a distancia no impiden que tu unidad esté oculta.
effect.fr: Ces attaques de tir n’empêchent pas votre unité d’être cachée.
effect.it: Quegli attacchi da tiro non impediscono alla tua unità di essere nascosta.
effect.ja: それらの射撃攻撃は、その自軍ユニットの隠密状態を解除しない。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 그 원거리 공격에도 불구하고 은폐 상태를 유지합니다.
effect.zh: 这些远程攻击不会阻止您的单位被隐藏。

fluff.en: Ratling snipers carefully scout out the most advantageous vantage points from which to unleash their kill shots, positions in which their eerie stillness and diminutive silhouette are hard to spot.
fluff.de: Rattling-Scharfschützen suchen sorgsam nach den vorteilhaftesten Aussichtsplattformen, von denen aus sie ihre tödlichen Schüsse versetzen können. In diesen Positionen sind sie dank ihrer stillen Haltung und kleinen Silhouette schwer auffindbar.
fluff.es: Los Rátidos exploran cuidadosamente los puntos estratégicos más ventajosos para disparar, posiciones en las que su inquietante quietud y su diminuta silueta son difíciles de distinguir.
fluff.fr: Les tireurs ratlings repèrent avec soin les emplacements les plus avantageux depuis lesquels dispenser leurs tirs mortels, des positions dans lesquelles leur petit gabarit et leur capacité troublante à rester immobiles les rendent difficiles à repérer.
fluff.it: I Ratling cecchini si posizionano attentamente nei punti più vantaggiosi da cui effettuare tiri micidiali. In tali postazioni la loro inquietante immobilità e la stazza ridotta li rendono difficili da individuare.
fluff.ja: ラットリングの狙撃手は致命弾を撃ち込む最適な高所を入念に選び、その場で不気味なまでに静けさを保ちつつ、小柄な体躯を周囲に溶け込ませる。
fluff.ko: 래틀링 저격수는 적에게 결정타를 날리기 좋은 고지를 찾아 면밀히 정찰한다. 그러한 위치에서 괴기스러울 정도로 가만히 있는 그 왜소한 체구를 감적하는 것은 매우 어렵다.
fluff.zh: 莱特林狙击手会小心翼翼地搜索最佳的制高点来进行狙击，他们静止不动的渺小身形难以被察觉。

name.ja: 下水スモッグ発生装置

target.en: One friendly <k>astra militarum infantry smoke</k> unit.
target.fr: Une unité d'<k>Infanterie</k> de l'<k>Astra Militarum</k> amie.
target.ja: 味方<k>帝国防衛軍・インファントリー</k>・ユニット1個。
target.ko: 아군 <k>아스트라 밀리타룸 보병 연막</k> 유닛 하나.
target.zh: 一个己方<k>星界军步兵</k>单位。

when.en: Start of your opponent’s Shooting phase
when.de: Zu Beginn der Fernkampfphase deines Gegners
when.es: Al inicio de la fase de disparo del oponente.
when.fr: Au début de la phase de Tir de votre adversaire
when.it: All’inizio della fase di Tiro dell’avversario
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ開始時。
when.zh: 在您对手的射击阶段开始时。

effect.en: When an attack targets either your unit, or a unit that is not fully visible to the attacking model because of one or more models in your unit, the target has the benefit of cover against that attack.
effect.de: Wenn eine Attacke gegen deine Einheit oder gegen eine Einheit, die wegen mindestens eines Modells deiner Einheit nicht vollständig sichtbar ist, ausgeführt wird, profitiert das Ziel gegen jene Attacke von Deckung.
effect.es: Cuando un ataque tome como blanco tu unidad o una unidad que no es completamente visible para la miniatura atacante debido a alguna miniatura de tu unidad, el blanco se beneficia de cobertura contra ese ataque.
effect.fr: Quand une attaque cible votre unité ou une unité qui n’est pas entièrement visible de la figurine attaquante à cause d’une ou plusieurs figurines de votre unité, la cible a le bénéfice du couvert contre cette attaque.
effect.it: Quando un attacco ha come bersaglio la tua unità o un’unità che non è completamente visibile al modello attaccante a causa di uno o più modelli nella tua unità, il bersaglio ha il beneficio della copertura contro quell’attacco.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニット、または攻撃側ユニットからの完全視認がこのユニットによって妨げられているユニットが攻撃の対象となった場合、そのユニットは、その攻撃に対して遮蔽物ボーナスを得る。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 공격의 대상으로 지정될 때, 또는 이 유닛의 모델 하나 이상으로 인해 공격하는 모델이 완전한 시야를 확보하지 못한 다른 유닛이 공격의 대상으로 지정될 때, 대상은 그 공격에만 적용되는 엄폐 효과를 받습니다.
effect.zh: 在该单位被选择成为攻击目标，或者在一个由于该单位中的模型导致自身对攻击模型不完全可见的单位被选择成为攻击目标时，被攻击的目标针对那次攻击拥有掩体增益。

fluff.en: Named for the density and reek of their concealing smoke, varied packs of foul chemicals are carried by elite scouts that can be ignited to foul the enemy’s aim.
fluff.de: Diese Granaten sind nach dem dichten und stinkenden Rauch benannt, den sie ausstoßen. Elitekundschafter tragen verschiedene Varianten dieser üblen Chemikalien bei sich, um sie zu zünden, wenn die Zielgenauigkeit des Feindes einen Dämpfer braucht.
fluff.es: Llamados así por la densidad y el hedor del humo que los oculta, unos químicos repugnantes son transportados por exploradores de élite que pueden encenderlos para frustrar la puntería del enemigo.
fluff.fr: Ainsi nommés en raison de la puanteur et de l’épaisseur de leur fumée, des agents chimiques infects et variés sont portés par des éclaireurs d’élite afin de confondre la visée de l’ennemi.
fluff.it: Noti per la densità e il fetore delle loro cortine di fumo, gli esploratori scelti portano vari pacchetti di orribili elementi chimici da incendiare per impedire al nemico di prendere la mira.
fluff.ja: 精鋭の斥候たちが携行する様々な梱包化学物質は、そこから発せられる煙幕の濃度と悪臭から名前が付けられるほど濃密な煙を放出し、敵の狙いを阻害することができる。
fluff.ko: 정예 정찰병들이 들고 다니는 이 연막탄의 이름은 그 지독한 밀도와 냄새에서 유래했으며, 여기에 불을 붙여 적의 사격을 방해할 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 这类装备的名字出自于它们释放出的浓厚且难闻的烟雾，精英侦察部队会携带这些化学物质并在需要时点燃，以妨碍敌人的瞄准。

target.en: One friendly <k>Scout Sentinel/astra militarum infantry</k> unit.
target.es: Una unidad <k>Sentinels Exploradores/Infantería Astra Militarum</k> amiga.
target.fr: Une unité de <k>Sentinel de Reconnaissance/Infanterie</k> de l’<k>Astra Militarum</k> amie.
target.ja: 味方<k>スカウト・センチネル/帝国防衛軍・インファントリー</k>・ユニット。
target.ko: 아군 <k>정찰 센티널/아스트라 밀리타룸 보병</k> 유닛 하나.
target.zh: 一个己方<k>侦查哨兵/星界军步兵</k>单位。

when.es: Al inicio de tu fase de disparo.
when.fr: Au début de votre phase de Tir.
when.it: All’inizio della tua fase di Tiro.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ開始時。
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段开始时。

effect.en: While a visible enemy unit is within 6" of your unit, that unit has +3" detection range.
effect.de: Solange sich eine für deine Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 6" befindet, hat jene Einheit +3" Entdeckungsreichweite.
effect.es: Siempre que una unidad enemiga sea visible para tu unidad y esté a 6" o menos de ella, esa unidad tiene +3" al alcance de detección.
effect.fr: Tant qu’une unité ennemie visible est à 6" ou moins de votre unité, l’unité ennemie a +3" en portée de détection.
effect.it: Fintanto che un’unità nemica visibile si trova entro 6" dalla tua unità, quell’unità ha +3" alla distanza di individuazione.
effect.ja: 敵ユニットが、その自軍ユニットの6mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能である間、そのユニットの発見範囲は+3mvの修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 적 유닛이 이 유닛의 6" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어오는 동안, 그 적 유닛에 발각 범위 +3"를 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 当一个可见敌方单位位于您的单位的 6" 内时，那个敌方单位的侦测范围 +3"。

fluff.en: With a daring reconnaissance dangerously close to the hiding enemy, soldiers can provide more accurate reports of their location.
fluff.de: Mit gewagten Beobachtungsmissionen in gefährlicher Feindesnähe können Soldaten akkurate Berichte von der Front schicken.
fluff.es: Con un audaz reconocimiento peligrosamente cerca del enemigo oculto, los soldados pueden proporcionar informes más precisos de su ubicación.
fluff.fr: Par un repérage audacieux dangereusement proche de l’ennemi caché, les soldats peuvent fournir des rapports précis sur les positions adverses.
fluff.it: Grazie a una temeraria ricognizione estremamente vicina al covo nemico, i soldati possono comunicare la sua posizione con più precisione.
fluff.ja: 果敢にも、潜伏中の敵に対して危険なまでに接近して偵察を行うことで、兵士はより正確に敵の位置を報告することができる。
fluff.ko: 정찰병은 위험을 감수하는 대담한 접근을 통해 숨어있는 적의 위치를 보다 정확하게 보고할 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 在大胆的侦察行动下，士兵们能够在极其危险的位置定位敌人，并将他们的准确坐标上报。

target.en: That <k>Astra Militarum Infantry</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité d’<k>Infanterie</k> de l’<k>Astra Militarum</k>.
target.ja: その<k>帝国防衛軍・インファントリー</k>・ユニット1個。

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged Astra Militarum Infantry unit.
when.de: Bewegungsphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine Bewegung innerhalb von 8" um eine befreundete Astra-Militarum-Infanterie-Einheit beendet, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
when.es: En la fase de movimiento del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga termina un movimiento a 8" o menos de una unidad Infantería Astra Militarum amiga no trabada.
when.fr: À la phase de Mouvement adverse, quand une unité ennemie finit un mouvement à 8" ou moins d’une unité d’Infanterie de l’Astra Militarum amie non engagée.
when.it: Nella fase di Movimento dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica termina un movimento entro 8" da un’unità di Fanteria dell’Astra Militarum non ingaggiata amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方の非接敵状態である帝国防衛軍・インファントリー・ユニットの8mv以内に一部でも入っている位置で移動を終了した時。
when.ko: 상대의 이동 페이즈, 적 유닛이 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 아스트라 밀리타룸 보명 유닛의 8" 내에서 이동을 종료할 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的移动阶段中，当一个敌方单位在一个不处于交战状态的己方星界军步兵单位的 8" 内结束一次移动时。

effect.en: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine normale Bewegung von bis zu W3+3" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 1D3+3".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement normal de D3+3" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo D3+3".
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、最大D3+3mvまでの通常移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 최대 D3+3"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D3+3" 的常规移动。

fluff.en: Alerted by proximity snares set up by recon teams, readied soldiers can evade their prowling foes to prepare new firing lines.
fluff.de: Diese Soldaten sind durch Annäherungssensoren gewarnt worden, die von vorgeschobenen Beobachtern ausgebracht wurden, und können ihren nahenden Feinden entgehen, um neue Feuerpositionen zu beziehen.
fluff.es: Alertados por las trampas de proximidad instaladas por los equipos de reconocimiento, los soldados preparados pueden evadir a sus enemigos al acecho para preparar nuevas líneas de fuego.
fluff.fr: Alertés par les collets de proximité disposés par les équipes de repérage, des soldats préparés peuvent se soustraire à l’ennemi qui rôde et établir de nouvelles lignes de tir.
fluff.it: Allertati da reti di prossimità piazzate da team di ricognizione, i soldati possono sfuggire ai nemici in agguato e preparare nuove linee di tiro.
fluff.ja: 偵察班が仕掛けた接近警報を受けた兵士たちは、潜む敵を回避しつつ新たな火線を構築することができる。
fluff.ko: 정찰조가 설치한 근접 감지 덫 덕분에 아군 병사들이 경계 태세를 취하며 그들을 노리는 적에 대응하기 위한 사선을 형성한다.
fluff.zh: 在侦察部队设置的陷阱被惊动后，准备充分的士兵们能够避开接近的敌人并建立新的射击阵地。

target.en: One friendly engaged Regiment unit.
target.ja: 非接敵状態の味方連隊・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个处于交战状态的己方兵团单位。

when.en: End of your opponent’s Charge phase.
when.de: Am Ende der Angriffsphase deines Gegners
when.es: Al final de la fase de carga del oponente.
when.fr: À la fin de la phase de Charge adverse.
when.it: Alla fine della fase di Carica dell'avversario.
when.ja: 敵軍側突撃フェイズ開始時。
when.zh: 在您对手的冲锋阶段结束时。

effect.en:
Roll one D6 for each enemy unit engaged with your unit:
  • On a 2+ that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.
Then, your unit suffers 3D3 mortal wounds.
effect.de:
Wirf für jede feindliche Einheit im Nahkampf mit deiner Einheit einen W6:
  • Bei 2+ erleidet jene feindliche Einheit W6 tödliche Verwundungen.
Dann erleidet deine Einheit 3W3 tödliche Verwundungen.
effect.es:
Tira 1D6 por cada unidad enemiga trabada con tu unidad.
  • Con 2+, esa unidad enemiga sufre 1D6 heridas mortales.
A continuación, tu unidad sufre 3D3 heridas mortales.
effect.fr:
Jetez un D6 pour chaque unité ennemie engagée avec votre unité :
  • Sur 2+ l’unité ennemie concernée subit D6 blessures mortelles.
Puis, votre unité subit 3D3 blessures mortelles.
effect.it:
Tira un D6 per ogni unità nemica ingaggiata con la tua unità:
  • Con 2+ quell'unità nemica subisce D6 ferite mortali.
Poi la tua unità subisce 3D3 ferite mortali.
effect.ja:
その自軍ユニットと接敵状態である敵ユニット1個ごとに、D6を1個ずつロールする：
  • ロール結果が2+の場合、その敵ユニットはD6ポイントの致命的ダメージを受ける。
    • その後、自軍ユニットは3D3ポイントの致命的ダメージを受ける。
effect.ko:
이 유닛과 교전 상태인 적 유닛마다 D6를 하나 굴려 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 값이 2+인 굴림마다 그 적 유닛이 D6 치명상을 입습니다.
그 다음, 이 유닛이 3D3 치명상을 입습니다.
effect.zh:
为每一个与您的单位处于交战状态的敌方单位掷一枚 D6。
  • 如果掷骰结果为 2+，那个敌方单位受到 D6 处致命伤。
随后，您的单位受到 3D3 处致命伤。

fluff.en: Circling Aeronautica Imperialis strike fighters wait above to launch strafing runs should the attack falter. In extremis, these assets can be called down upon Imperial positions in danger of being overrun, affording soldiers the desperate dignity of taking their enemies with them into death
fluff.de: In den Wolken kreisen Bomber der Aeronautica Imperialis, bereit, Bodenangriffe zu starten, sofern der Angriff ins Stocken gerät. In Extremfällen können diese Flieger auch von imperialen Positionen angefordert werden, die Gefahr laufen, überrannt zu werden, was immerhin einen würdevollen Tod verspricht, bei dem man den Feind mit sich nimmt.
fluff.es: Cazas de la Aeronautica Imperialis esperan en el aire para lanzar andanadas si el ataque falla. In extremis, estos medios pueden ser lanzados sobre posiciones imperiales en peligro de ser superadas, ofreciendo a los soldados la desesperada dignidad de llevar a sus enemigos con ellos a la muerte.
fluff.fr: Des chasseurs de l’Aeronautica Imperialis volent en cercle, prêts à attaquer au passage si l’offensive s’enlise. En cas extrême, on peut appeler ces éléments à intervenir sur des positions menacées d’être submergées, en accordant aux soldats l’ultime dignité d’emporter l’ennemi avec eux.
fluff.it: I caccia d'assalto dell'Aeronautica Imperialis volano in cerchio in attesa di effettuare attacchi radenti se l'offensiva dovesse vacillare. In extremis, si possono inviare queste risorse sulle posizioni che rischiano di essere sopraffatte, dando ai soldati la disperata dignità di portare i nemici con sé nella morte.
fluff.ja: 上空では、攻撃が頓挫した際に機銃掃射を行うため、帝国航空隊（ルビ、帝国航空隊：エアロノーティカ・インペリアリス）の地上攻撃機が旋回して待機している。極限の状況においては、制圧の危機に瀕する自陣地へこれらの戦力を呼び寄せることが可能であり、兵士たちは自らの死とともに敵を道連れにするという絶望的な尊厳を得る。
fluff.ko: 아군 공세가 실패할 경우를 대비하여, 에어로노티카 임페리알리스 전투기가 상공에서 선회하며 지상 소사를 준비하고 있다. 이 자산은 제국 진영이 적에게 뒤덮일 위기의 절망적인 상황에서 아군 병사들이 적과 함께 전사하여 마지막 존엄성이나마 지킬 수 있게끔 그 위치로 공격을 호출받기도 한다.
fluff.zh: 盘旋于战场上方的帝国空军攻击机随时准备在进攻失败时发起低空扫射。在极端情况下，面临包围的阵地会呼叫这些战机进行攻击，让士兵们至少能够带上敌人一同死去。

name.ja: サーボスカル射撃指示

target.en: That <k>Militarum Tempestus</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>特務機動部隊</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>Militarum Tempestus</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete <k>Militarum</k>-<k>Tempestus</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad <k>Militarum Tempestus</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité du <k>Militarum Tempestus</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, dopo che un'unità del <k>Militarum Tempestus</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>特務機動部隊</k>・ユニットが射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>밀리타룸 템페스투스</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，在一个己方<k>暴风军</k>单位完成射击后。

effect.en: Select one enemy unit hit by those ranged attacks. Friendly <k>Militarum Tempestus</k> units’ ranged attacks that target that enemy unit have <k>[Ignores Cover]</k>.
effect.de: Wähle eine von mindestens einer jener Fernkampfattacken getroffene feindliche Einheit. Fernkampfattacken befreundeter <k>Militarum</k>-<k>Tempestus</k>-Einheiten gegen jene feindliche Einheit haben <k>[Deckung ignorieren]</k>.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga en la que haya impactado alguno de esos ataques a distancia. Los ataques de las unidades <k>Militarum Tempestus</k> amigas que tomen como blanco esa unidad enemiga tienen <k>[Ignora cobertura]</k>.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie touchée par ces attaques de tir. Les attaques de tir des unités du <k>Militarum Tempestus</k> amies qui ciblent l’unité ennemie choisie ont <k>[Ignore le Couvert]</k>.
effect.it: Scegli un'unità nemica colpita da quegli attacchi da tiro. Gli attacchi da tiro delle unità del <k>Militarum Tempestus</k> amiche che hanno come bersaglio quell'unità nemica hanno <k>[Ignora la Copertura]</k>.
effect.ja: それらの射撃攻撃がヒットした敵ユニットを1個選択する。味方<k>特務機動部隊</k>・ユニットの射撃攻撃が、その敵ユニットを攻撃対象に選択した場合、その攻撃は<k>［遮蔽無効］</k>を持つ。
effect.ko: 그 원거리 공격이 명중한 적 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 아군 <k>밀리타룸 템페스투스</k> 유닛의 원거리 공격에 <k>[엄폐 무시]</k>를 부여합니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个被那些远程攻击命中的敌方单位。己方<k>暴风军</k>单位针对那个敌方单位进行的远程攻击拥有<k>[无视掩体]</k>。

fluff.en: Released in a swarm from a modified Valkyrie gunship, high‑altitude servo‑skulls analyse targeting data from the ongoing fight and then provide updated firing solutions to the troops on the ground
fluff.de: Eine modifizierte Walküre setzt einen Schwarm dieser Servoschädel ab, die hoch über dem Schlachtfeld fliegend taktische Daten analysieren und die Feuerleitlösungen der Bodentruppen verbessern.
fluff.es: Lanzados desde una cañonera Valkyrie modificada, servocráneos a gran altitud analizan los datos de la zona y proporcionan soluciones de tiro actualizadas a las tropas sobre el terreno.
fluff.fr: Lâchés en altitude depuis un Valkyrie modifié, des servocrânes de haute altitude analysent les données de ciblage de l’affrontement en cours et fournissent des solutions de tir aux troupes terrestres.
fluff.it: Rilasciati in gran numero da una cannoniera Valkyrie modificata, i servoteschi ad alta quota analizzano i dati di puntamento dello scontro in corso e forniscono soluzioni di tiro aggiornate alle truppe a terra.
fluff.ja: 改造されたヴァルキリー・ガンシップから群れをなして放たれたこの高高度型サーボスカルは、進行中の戦闘における標的データを解析し、地上の部隊に対して最新の射撃解決策を提供する。
fluff.ko: 개조된 발키리 건십에서 대량으로 방출되는 고공 서보스컬은 진행 중인 전투에서 표적 데이터를 분석하고 지상 병력에 포격 제원을 갱신해준다.
fluff.zh: 这些伺服颅骨会被专用的女武神炮艇投放到战场高空，它们能够对当前战斗的目标进行数据分析并为前线的士兵提供射击方案。

target.en: That <k>Militarum Tempestus/Kasrkin</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>特務機動部隊/カサーキン</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>暴风军/卡舍津</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Militarum Tempestus/Kasrkin unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Militarum-­Tempestus-/Kasrkin-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Militarum Tempestus/Kasrkin amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité du Militarum Tempestus/Kasrkins amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un'unità di Militarum Tempestus/Kaserkin amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方特務機動部隊/カサーキン・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 밀리타룸 템페스투스/카스르킨 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方暴风军/卡舍津单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s Hot‑shot Lascarbines, Hot‑shot Lasguns, Hot‑shot Laspistols, Hot‑shot Marksman Rifles, Hot‑shot Volley Guns and Sentry Hot‑shot Volley Guns weapons that targeted an enemy unit within 12" have +1 S and AP.
effect.de: Die Hochenergie-Laserkarabiner-, Hochenergie-Laserpistole-, Hochenergie-Scharfschützengewehr-, Hochenergie-Salvengewehr- und Hochenergie-Wacht-Salvengewehr-Waffen deiner Einheit, die eine feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12" als Ziel haben, haben +1 S und DS.
effect.es: Las armas carabina láser potenciada, rifle láser potenciado, pistola láser potenciada, rifle de tirador potenciado, fusil repetidor potenciado, y fusil repetidor potenciado centinela de tu unidad que tomaron como blanco una unidad enemiga a 12" o menos, tienen +1 a F y +1 a FP.
effect.fr: Les Carabines Radiantes Laser, Fusils Radiants Laser, Pistolets Radiants Laser, Fusils de Sniper Radiant, Fusils radiants à Salve et Fusils radiants à Salve de Sentinelle de votre unité qui ont ciblé une unité ennemie à 12" ou moins ont +1 en F et en PA.
effect.it: Le armi carabina perfolaser, fucile perfolaser, pistola perfolaser, fucile perfolaser di precisione, fucile perfolaser a raffica e fucile perfolaser a raffica della sentinella che hanno come bersaglio un'unità nemica entro 12" hanno +1 Fo e +1 VP.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの「ホットショット・ラスカービン」、「ホットショット・ラスガン」、「ホットショット・ラスピストル」、「ホットショット・マークスマンライフル」、「ホットショット・ヴォレイガン」、「セントリー・ホットショット・ヴォレイガン」武器は、12mv以内に一部でも入っている敵ユニットを攻撃対象とした場合、【攻】と【貫】に+1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 12" 내에 있는 적을 대상으로 지정하는 이 유닛의 핫샷 라스카빈, 핫샷 라스건, 핫샷 지정사수소총, 핫샷 볼리 건, 센트리 핫샷 볼리 건 무기에 위력 및 관통 +1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 在您的单位对一个位于其 12" 内的敌方单位进行攻击时，高能激光卡宾枪、高能激光枪、高能激光手枪、高能激光狙击枪、高能齐射枪和哨戒高能齐射枪武器拥有 +1 S 和 AP。

fluff.en: At the risk of permanently burning out power packs, hot‑shot weaponry can be temporarily overcharged to provide additional punch at the crucial moment.
fluff.de: Auch wenn man riskiert, die Energiezellen damit permanent auszubrennen, so können Hochenergiewaffen doch temporär überladen werden, um im entscheidenden Moment zusätzliche Stoppwirkung zu erzielen.
fluff.es: A riesgo de quemar permanentemente sus cargadores, las armas pueden sobrecargarse temporalmente para proporcionar una potencia adicional en el momento crucial.
fluff.fr: On peut ponctuellement surcharger les armes radiantes laser au risque d’épuiser définitivement leurs paquetages d’alimentation, mais cela permet d’augmenter leur impact à un moment crucial.
fluff.it: A rischio di consumare in modo permanente i caricatori, si possono sovraccaricare temporaneamente le armi perfolaser per avere maggiore potenza nel momento cruciale.
fluff.ja: パワーパックが不可逆的に焼き付く危険を伴うものの、決定的な瞬間にさらなる威力を発揮するため、ホットショット兵器は一時的に過充電（ルビ、過充電：オーヴァーチャージ）することが可能である。
fluff.ko: 핫샷 무기는 그 동력 팩이 과다 가열될 위험을 감수하고 일시적으로 과충전하여 중요한 순간에 더욱 강한 화력을 낼 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 尽管存在完全烧坏能量电池的危险，但高能激光武器能够进行暂时的过载，在关键时刻提供额外的威力。

name.ja: 抜け目なき眼（アップグレード）

description.en: Ratlings unit only. When this unit is selected to shoot, enemy units have +6" detection range until this unit has shot.
description.de: Nur für eine Rattling-Einheit. Wenn diese Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird, haben feindliche Einheiten +6" Entdeckungsreichweite, bis diese Einheit geschossen hat.
description.es: Solo unidad Rátidos. Cuando esta unidad se elija para disparar, las unidades enemigas tienen +6" al alcance de detección hasta que esta unidad haya disparado.
description.fr: Unité de Ratlings seulement. Quand cette unité est choisie pour tirer, les unités ennemies ont +6" en portée de détection jusqu’à ce que cette unité ait tiré.
description.it: Solo unità di Ratling. Quando questa unità viene scelta per tirare, le unità nemiche hanno +6" alla distanza di individuazione finché questa unità non ha sparato.
description.ja: ラットリング・兵のみ。このユニットが射撃を宣言した時、このユニットの射撃が終了するまで、敵ユニットの 発見範囲は+6mvの修正を受ける。
description.ko: 래틀링 유닛 전용. 이 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때, 이 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료할 때까지 적 유닛에 발각 범위 +6"를 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限莱特林单位。当该单位被选择进行射击时，在该单位完成射击前，敌方单位拥有 +6" 侦测范围。

name.ja: 勇敢なる模範（アップグレード）

description.en: Commissar model only. This model has Feel No Pain 4+.
description.de: Nur für ein Kommissar-Modell. Dieses Modell hat Verletzungen ­ignorieren 4+.
description.es: Solo miniatura Comisario. Esta miniatura tiene No hay dolor 4+.
description.fr: Figurine de Commissaire seulement. Cette figurine a Insensible à la Douleur 4+.
description.it: Solo modelli di Commissario. Questo modello ha Insensibile al Dolore 4+.
description.ja: コミッサー・兵のみ。この兵は『痛みを知らぬ者4+』を持つ。
description.zh: 仅限政委模型。该模型拥有不觉疼痛 4+。

name.ja: 遠距離偵察兵（アップグレード）

description.en: Scout Sentinel unit only. This unit has Infiltrators.
description.de: Nur für eine Wächter-Spähläufer-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat Infiltratoren.
description.es: Solo unidad SENTINEL Explorador. Esta unidad tiene Infiltradores.
description.fr: Unité de Sentinel de Reconnaissance seulement. Cette unité a Infiltrateurs.
description.it: Solo unità di Sentinel Esploratori. Questa unità ha Infiltratori.
description.ja: スカウト・センチネル・ユニットのみ。このユニットは浸透戦術を持つ。
description.ko: 정찰 센티널 유닛 전용. 이 유닛에 침투조를 부여합니다.
description.zh: 仅限侦查哨兵单位。该单位拥有渗透者。

name.ja: 偵察星章（アップグレード）

description.en: Astra Militarum Infantry Platoon unit only. In your first Movement phase, this unit can make an ingress move.
description.de: Nur für eine Astra-Militarum-Infanterie-Zug-Einheit. In deiner ersten Bewegungsphase kann diese Einheit eine Einsatzbewegung ausführen.
description.es: Solo unidad Pelotón Infantería Astra Militarum. En tu primera fase de movimiento, esta unidad puede hacer un movimiento de inserción.
description.fr: Unité de Peloton de l’Astra Militarum seulement. À votre première phase de Mouvement, cette unité peut faire un mouvement d’arrivée.
description.it: Solo unità di Plotone di Fanteria dell'Astra Militarum. Nella tua prima fase di Movimento questa unità può effettuare un movimento di inserzione.
description.ja: 帝国防衛軍・小隊・ユニットのみ。自軍の最初の移動フェイズ中、このユニットは 突入移動を行える。
description.ko: 아스트라 밀리타룸 보병 소대 유닛 전용. 플레이어의 첫 번째 이동 페이즈에, 이 유닛이 진입 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限星界军步兵步兵排单位。在您的第一个移动阶段中，该单位可以进行一次入场移动。

name.ja: ボンバスト級ヴォクスアレイ

description.en: Militarum Tempestus Officer model only. When this model issues an Order, if this unit has the Master Vox wargear ability, this model can issue that Order to up to three different Regiment units, instead of only one.
description.de: Nur für ein Militarum-Tempestus-Offizier-Modell. Wenn dieses Modell einen Befehl erteilt und diese Einheit die Ausrüstungsfähigkeit Hochleistungsfunkgerät hat, kann dieses Modell jenen Befehl bis zu drei verschiedenen Regiment-Einheiten statt nur einer erteilen.
description.es: Solo miniatura Oficial Militarum Tempestus. Cuando esta miniatura da una Orden, si esta unidad tiene la habilidad de equipo Vocomaestro, esta miniatura puede dar esa Orden a hasta 3 unidades Regimiento diferentes, en lugar de solo a 1.
description.fr: Figurine d’Officier du Militarum Tempestus seulement. quand cette figurine donne un Ordre, si cette unité a l’aptitude d’équipement Vox de Maître, cette figurine peut donner cet Ordre à trois unités de Régiment différentes maximum, au lieu d’une seule.
description.it: Solo modelli di Ufficiale del Militarum Tempestus. Quando questo modello impartisce un Ordine, se questa unità ha l'abilità dell'equipaggiamento Master Vox, questo modello può impartire quell'Ordine a un massimo di tre diverse unità Reggimento, invece che solo a una.
description.ja: ミリタルム・テンペストゥス・将校・兵のみ。この兵が 命令を発令する時、このユニットが『マスター・ヴォクス』ウォーギアアビリティを持っている場合、この兵はその 命令を（1回限りではなく）最大3個までの異なる連隊・ユニットに発令してもよい。
description.ko: 밀리타룸 템페스투스 장교 모델 전용. 이 모델이 명령을 하달할 때, 이 유닛이 마스터 복스 전투장비 능력을 보유하고 있다면, 이 모델은 그 명령을 하나가 아닌 최대 3개의 서로 다른 연대 유닛에 하달할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限风暴军军官模型。在该模型发布一个命令时，如果该单位拥有大功率通讯器武器装备技能，那么该模型可以对最多三个不同的兵团单位发布那个命令，而不是一个。

description.en: Militarum Tempestus Officer model only. In your first Movement phase, this unit can make an ingress move.
description.de: Nur für ein Militarum-Tempestus-Offizier-Modell. In deiner ersten Bewegungsphase kann diese Einheit eine Einsatzbewegung ausführen.
description.es: Solo miniatura Oficial Militarum Tempestus. En tu primera fase de movimiento, esta unidad puede hacer un movimiento de inserción.
description.fr: Figurine d’Officier du Militarum Tempestus seulement. À votre première phase de Mouvement, cette unité peut faire un mouvement d’arrivée.
description.it: Solo modelli di Ufficiale del Militarum Tempestus. Nella tua prima fase di Movimento questa unità può effettuare un movimento di inserzione.
description.ja: ミリタルム・テンペストゥス・将校・兵のみ。自軍の最初の移動フェイズ中、このユニットは 突入移動を行える。
description.ko: 밀리타룸 템페스투스 장교 모델 전용. 플레이어의 첫 번째 이동 페이즈에, 이 유닛은 진입 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限暴风军军官模型。在您的第一个移动阶段中，该单位可以进行一次入场移动。

description.en: Upgrade: Drayden's Lance Kasrkin unit only. This unit’s snap shooting attacks hit on unmodified hit rolls of 4+.
description.de: Aufwertung: Nur für eine Draydens-Lanze-Kasrkin-Einheit. Eiliger-Beschuss-Attacken dieser Einheit treffen bei unmodifizierten Trefferwürfen von 4+.
description.es: Talento: Solo unidad Kasrkin Lanza de Drayden. Los ataques de disparos repentinos de esta unidad impactan con toda tirada para impactar de 4+ sin modificar.
description.fr: Amélioration : Unité de Kasrkins de la Lance de Drayden seulement. Les attaques de tir au jugé de cette unité touchent sur des jets de touche non modifiés de 4+.
description.it: Miglioria: Solo unità di Kaserkin della Lancia di Drayden. Gli attacchi tiro improvviso di questa unità colpiscono con tiri per colpire non modificati di 4+.
description.ja: アップグレード：ドライデン突撃騎兵隊・カサーキン・ユニットのみ。このユニットの即応射撃攻撃は、修正前のヒットロールの出目が4+でヒットする。
description.ko: 업그레이드: 드레이든의 창 카스르킨 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 스냅 샷 공격은 보정되지 않은 명중 굴림의 값이 4+이면 명중합니다.
description.zh: 升级：仅限德雷登的骑兵队卡舍津单位。该单位的快速射击攻击在未修正命中掷骰结果为 4+ 时命中。

description.en: Drayden's Lance Officer model only. (Once per battle, per unit) At the start of any phase, you can use this ability. If you do, select one friendly Drayden's Lance unit. That unit heals D3+2 wounds.
description.de: Nur für ein Draydens-Lanze-Offizier-Modell. (Einmal pro Schlacht, pro Einheit) Du kannst diese Fähigkeit zu Beginn einer beliebigen Phase einsetzen. Wenn du dies tust, wähle eine befreundete Draydens-Lanze-Einheit. Jene Einheit wird um W3+2 Lebenspunkte geheilt.
description.es: Solo miniatura Oficial Lanza de Drayden. (Una vez por batalla, por unidad) Al inicio de cualquier fase, puedes usar esta habilidad. SI lo haces, elige 1 unidad Lanza de Drayden amiga. Esa unidad se cura 1D3+2 heridas.
description.fr: Figurine d’Officier de Lance de Drayden seulement. (Une fois par bataille, par unité) Au début de n’importe quelle phase, vous pouvez utiliser cette aptitude. Dans ce cas, choisissez une unité de Lance de Drayden amie. L’unité choisie soigne D3+2 points de vie.
description.it: Solo modelli di Ufficiale della Lancia di Drayden. (Una volta per battaglia, per unità) Puoi usare questa abilità all’inizio di qualsiasi fase. Se lo fai, scegli un’unità della Lancia di Drayden amica. Quell’unità guarisce D3+2 ferite.
description.ja: ドライデン突撃騎兵隊・将校・兵のみ。（ユニットごとに、バトル中1回限り）任意のフェイズ開始時、自軍はこのアビリティを使用できる。使用した場合、味方ドライデン突撃騎兵隊・ユニットを1個選択する。選択された味方ユニットは【負傷限界】をD3+２ポイント回復する。
description.ko: 드레이든의 창 장교 모델 전용. (유닛마다 전투당 한 번) 어느 페이즈든 시작 시, 이 능력을 사용할 수 있습니다. 그렇게 할 경우, 아군 드레이든의 창 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. 그 유닛이 D3+2 체력을 회복합니다.
description.zh: 仅限德雷登的骑兵队军官模型。（每个单位，每场战斗限一次）在任意阶段开始时，您可以使用本技能。若使用，选择一个己方德雷登的骑兵队单位。那个单位治疗 D3+2 点耐伤。

description.en: **OFFICER** model only. While the bearer’s unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit, instead of changing it to 0.

**OFFICER** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, if that unit Remained Stationary this turn, a Critical Hit is scored on a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+.
**OFFICER** model only. In your Command phase, the bearer can issue one additional Order.

**OFFICER** model only. Each time an enemy unit is set up within 9" of the bearer’s unit, the bearer can issue one Order. This is not counted towards the number of Orders the bearer can issue in a battle round.
**INFANTRY OFFICER** model only. While the bearer is leading a **REGIMENT** unit, that unit has the Scouts 6" ability.
**INFANTRY OFFICER** model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.
**INFANTRY OFFICER** model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristics of the bearer’s Pistols.
**OFFICER** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, when that unit is issued an Order, it is also affected by the Take Cover! Order.

**INFANTRY OFFICER** model only. If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase, and the bearer’s unit (or any **TRANSPORT** it is embarked within) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under you control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

**ASTRA MILITARUM TECH-PRIEST ENGINSEER** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one **TRANSPORT** from your army (excluding **AIRCRAFT** and **TITANIC** units) within 3" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, each time that **TRANSPORT** makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.
**INFANTRY OFFICER** model only. The bearer’s unit has the Benefit of Cover and the Stealth ability while the bearer’s unit is wholly within 3" of one or more friendly **TRANSPORT** models.

**INFANTRY OFFICER** model only. The bearer’s unit can disembark from a **TRANSPORT** after it has Advanced. If it does, it counts as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.
**VEHICLE OFFICER** model only. Once per turn, after the bearer issues an Order to a **SQUADRON** unit from your army, it can issue the same Order to another **SQUADRON** unit from your army.
**VEHICLE OFFICER** model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.
**VEHICLE OFFICER** model only. Add 3 to the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic.
**VEHICLE OFFICER** model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

**INFANTRY OFFICER** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, if the bearer is on the battlefield, select up to three other **ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY** units from your army and redeploy them.
